instruction: In ~/Desktop/project_cache, delete all .log files larger than 1KB and all empty directories. Keep .conf and .dat files untouched. After cleanup, create ~/Desktop/cleanup_report.txt with three lines: deleted_logs=<count of deleted .log files>, removed_dirs=<count of removed empty dirs>, kept_files=<count of remaining files>.
source: 外部参考来源：Canonical tutorial - Command line for beginners (https://ubuntu.com/tutorials/command-line-for-beginners)

parameters.command: rm -rf ~/Desktop/project_cache ~/Desktop/cleanup_report.txt; mkdir -p ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_b ~/Desktop/project_cache/empty_dir1 ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/empty_sub; printf '%02000d' 0 > ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/big.log; printf '%02000d' 0 > ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_b/huge.log; printf 'tiny' > ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/small.log; printf 'config_data' > ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/app.conf; printf 'binary_data' > ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_b/cache.dat

command: import pyautogui; import time; time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.click({SCREEN_WIDTH_HALF}, {SCREEN_HEIGHT_HALF}); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.hotkey('ctrl', 'alt', 't'); time.sleep(0.5)

result.command:
big_gone='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/big.log ] && big_gone='true'; huge_gone='false'; [ ! -f ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_b/huge.log ] && huge_gone='true'; small_kept='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/small.log ] && small_kept='true'; conf_kept='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/app.conf ] && conf_kept='true'; dat_kept='false'; [ -f ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_b/cache.dat ] && dat_kept='true'; empty1_gone='false'; [ ! -d ~/Desktop/project_cache/empty_dir1 ] && empty1_gone='true'; emptysub_gone='false'; [ ! -d ~/Desktop/project_cache/module_a/empty_sub ] && emptysub_gone='true'; expected=$(printf 'deleted_logs=2
removed_dirs=2
kept_files=3
'); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/cleanup_report.txt 2>/dev/null); report_ok='false'; [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] && report_ok='true'; echo "big_gone=$big_gone"; echo "huge_gone=$huge_gone"; echo "small_kept=$small_kept"; echo "conf_kept=$conf_kept"; echo "dat_kept=$dat_kept"; echo "empty1_gone=$empty1_gone"; echo "emptysub_gone=$emptysub_gone"; echo "report_ok=$report_ok"
